chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-6564 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 21-02-2025 Mr. Muhammad Asad Ashfaq Tola Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Langah, Advocate for Respondent Mr. Kashif Hanif Advocate for Respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel states that the Petitioner shall seek remedy before the appropriate forum for refund/adjustment in the first instance, hence, he does not press this petition. Petition is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Amjad PS
